name: @parel/sandbox-vercel
description: Provides the standard parel.sandbox capability backed by Vercel Sandbox.

token.description: Vercel API token or OIDC token

projectId.description: Vercel project id for Sandbox operations

config.name: Optional named sandbox. Named sandboxes are reused with getOrCreate by default.
config.runtime: Optional Vercel Sandbox runtime, such as node24 or python3.13.
config.destroyOnSessionEnd: Defaults to true. When false, the sandbox is stopped instead of deleted.
